LanguageData.WM_CoordinateWorks.label: coordinate works
LanguageData.WM_CoordinateWorks.description: This person is coordinating construction and logistics, boosting efficiency for everyone nearby.
LanguageData.WM_CoordinateWorksBuff.label: coordinate works
LanguageData.WM_CoordinateWorksBuff.description: This person's construction, hauling, and movement speeds are boosted thanks to being near a surveyor using coordinate works.
